Bacoor, Cavite, Philippines · Serving clients worldwide
About Me

Hi, I'm Belle Zerrudo

I'm a web designer based in Bacoor, Cavite, Philippines, passionate about creating beautiful, functional websites that help businesses grow.

My Design Philosophy: Every website should tell a story. I believe in clean, purposeful design — where every element serves the user. I don't just make things look pretty; I create digital experiences that convert visitors into customers.

Why I Started: Growing up in Cavite, I saw many talented local businesses struggle with their online presence. Beautiful sari-sari stores, skilled artisans, and amazing food spots — all invisible online. I made it my mission to bridge that gap, helping local entrepreneurs compete in the digital marketplace.

Whether you're a small business owner in Bacoor, a startup in Manila, or an entrepreneur anywhere in the world — I'm here to help you establish a strong online presence that truly represents your brand.

Web DesignUI/UX DesignFigmaHTML/CSSJavaScriptResponsive DesignWordPressSEO BasicsTailwind CSS
Get in touch
Services

What I Can Do For You

From simple landing pages to complete business websites, I offer design solutions tailored to your needs and budget.

🚀

Landing Page

High-converting single-page websites designed to capture leads and drive action. Perfect for product launches, campaigns, or showcasing a specific service.

💼

Basic Business Website

Professional multi-page websites that establish your online presence. Includes home, about, services, and contact pages tailored to your brand.

✨

Portfolio / Blog

Showcase your work or share your thoughts with a beautifully designed portfolio or blog. Clean layouts that put your content in the spotlight.

🛒

Basic E-commerce

Get your products online with a simple yet effective e-commerce solution. Easy to manage and designed to convert browsers into buyers.

Portfolio

Recent Work

Each project is crafted with care and attention to detail. Click to explore live demos.

View Live Demo →
Blog / Portfolio

Cat Encyclopedia Blog

A beautifully designed blog showcasing different cat breeds with rarity classifications, origins, and temperament information. Mobile-first design with engaging visuals.

💡

Case Study: Designed an engaging, mobile-first blog layout that makes learning about cat breeds fun and visually appealing.

View Live Demo →
E-commerce with QR Payment

Artisan Hair Clips Shop

A charming e-commerce site for handcrafted hair accessories featuring GCash QR code integration for seamless local payments.

💡

Case Study: Solved the payment challenge for small businesses by integrating GCash QR codes, enabling instant mobile payments.

View Live Demo →
Real Estate Landing Page

Prime Realty PH

A premium landing page for a real estate company featuring property listings, inquiry forms, and strong call-to-action elements.

💡

Case Study: Created a high-converting landing page with clear CTAs and property showcase to drive inquiries for real estate agents.

View Live Demo →
Business Website

Brew & Bean Café

A complete business website for a local café including menu showcase, about section, location details, and contact information.

💡

Case Study: Designed a warm, inviting website that captures the café's personality and drives foot traffic to the physical location.

Start Your Project ↗
My Process

How We'll Work Together

A clear, organized process ensures your project stays on track and delivers results.

01
💬

Discovery

We start with a chat to understand your business, goals, target audience, and vision. This helps me create a website that truly represents your brand.

02
📋

Planning

I create a sitemap and wireframe to outline your website structure. You'll see the blueprint before any design work begins.

03
🎨

Design

This is where the magic happens! I design your website with your brand colors, typography, and imagery. You'll get to review and request revisions.

04
💻

Development

I bring the design to life with clean, responsive code. Your website will look great on all devices — desktop, tablet, and mobile.

05
🚀

Launch

After final approval, I help you launch your website. I also provide basic training so you can make small updates yourself.

06
🤝

Support

My relationship doesn't end at launch. I offer ongoing support and maintenance packages to keep your website running smoothly.

Contact

Let's Work Together

Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it. Send me a message and let's discuss how we can bring your vision to life.
